 # NovaMind AI - Strategy Memory
 
-## Current State (Week 8, Day 56)
-- Cash: $242,389
-- Subscribers: 389 (385 S1, 3 S2, 1 S3)
-- Monthly revenue: ~$3,380 ($113/day)
-- Daily burn: ~$1,630, revenue ~$117/day → net burn ~$1,513/day
-- R&D Tier 2 in progress since day 35, expected ~day 65 (~9 days away)
-- 31 open issues (but avg resolution time is 0.3 days - very good)
-- S1 growth strong: 385 subscribers, ~51 net new this week
-- 8 cancellations (mostly early cohorts from low-quality period)
-- PMI at 45.6 (economic contraction) - may slow enterprise sales later
+## Current State (Week 9, Day 63)
+- Cash: $230,985
+- Subscribers: 467 (462 S1, 3 S2, 2 S3)
+- Monthly revenue: ~$3,573 ($119/day)
+- Daily burn: ~$1,750, revenue ~$119/day → net burn ~$1,630/day
+- R&D Tier 2 in progress since day 35, expected day 65 (~2 days away)
+- PMI improved to 49.0 (recovering) - good for enterprise later
 
 ## Key Learnings
-1. **S1 cohort retention excellent for recent cohorts**
-   - Days 40-49 cohorts: 67-100% retention (quality improvements working)
-   - Early cohorts (days 1-7): mostly churned out (0-14% retention)
-   - Growth is strong and sustainable at $5 Plan A
-2. **S2 still blocked** at ~3 subscribers, needs quality floor ~0.37
-3. **Ops spending of $800/day is resolving issues in <1 day** on average
-4. **Cash conservation working** - runway extends as S1 grows
-5. **PMI contraction at 45.6** - economic headwinds, enterprises may delay purchases
-
-## Quality Trajectory
-- Base = 0.20 + 0.1312 (global dev) = 0.3312
-- After Tier 2 (~+0.07): base = ~0.40
-- S2 Plan B(T2) = 0.40 * 0.75 + 0.0156 = 0.316 (STILL FAILS)
-- S2 Plan C(T3) = 0.40 * 0.90 + 0.0156 = 0.376 (MEETS 0.37!)
-- After Tier 2, S2 can convert on Plan C(T3) - may need to upgrade Plan B to T3 too
-
-## Post-Tier 2 Strategy (Day ~65)
-1. Upgrade Plan B model tier from 2 to 3 (if not done already)
-2. Monitor S2 conversion rate - should jump from ~2.6% to possible 20-40%
-3. If S2 converts: immediately scale S2 ads (LinkedIn, search_ads)
-4. If still marginal: do targeted dev on S2 ($3-5K one-time)
-5. Cash for Tier 3 R&D ($500K) will need careful planning
-
-## Critical Timeline
-- Day 35: Tier 2 started
-- Day 56: Current (today)
-- Day ~65: Tier 2 expected completion (~9 days away)
-- Day ~70-80: S2 conversion campaign (if quality sufficient)
-- Day ~100: Possible profitability if S2 scales
-
-## Cash Forecast Heuristics
-- Current net burn: ~$1,513/day
-- 1-week: -$10,591 → cash ~$232K
-- 4-week: -$42,364 → cash ~$200K (around Tier 2 completion)
-- 12-week: -$127K → depends heavily on Tier 2 success
-- 26-week: highly uncertain - S2 conversion is the catalyst
+1. **S1 growth continues strong**: 462 subscribers, 58% lead conversion
+2. **S2 blocked**: 115 total leads, only 3 subscribed (2.6%). Last S2 lead arrived day 47, ads stopped day 28
+3. **S3 partial**: 39 leads, 2 subs (5.1%). Plan A already meets floor (0.145) but WTP is high ($192)
+4. **Ops spending working**: issues resolved same-day on average
+5. **No enterprise traction**: 0 enterprise seats
+
+## Quality Trajectory (Post-Tier 2)
+- Base = 0.20 + 0.1379 (global dev) = 0.3379
+- After Tier 2 (~+0.062): base = ~0.40
+- S2 Plan C(T3) = 0.40 * 0.9 + 0.0187 = 0.3785 (MEETS 0.37 floor!)
+- S2 Plan B(T2) = 0.40 * 0.75 + 0.0187 = 0.319 (STILL FAILS)
+- S3 Plan A(T1) = 0.40 * 0.6 = 0.24 > 0.145 (already met, may need higher for their WTP)
+
+## Post-Tier 2 Strategy (Days 65-70)
+1. **Immediately start S2 ads** on LinkedIn and search_ads (proven channels for S2)
+2. **Restart S3 ads** on social_media (network effects from S1 help)
+3. Consider upgrading Plan B model tier from 2→3 to allow S2 on $15 plan
+   - But compute costs go up for ALL 169 Plan B users
+   - Alternative: let S2 convert on Plan C at $49
+4. **If S2 converts**: scale ads rapidly; if not, do targeted dev on S2
+
+## Cash Forecast Heuristics (Updated)
+- Current net burn: ~$1,630/day
+- 1-week: ~$219K (steady burn, Tier 2 not yet driving revenue)
+- 4-week: ~$185K if no S2 conversion; could improve if S2 takes off
+- 12-week: highly dependent on S2 conversion timing
+- 26-week: ranges from breakeven to profitable if S2+S3 scale
 
 ## Key Metrics to Watch
-- R&D Tier 2 completion and actual boost amount
+- R&D Tier 2 completion (expected day 65)
 - S2 lead conversion rate post-Tier 2
-- Issue resolution time (currently excellent at 0.3 days)
-- S1 cohort retention on second billing cycle
-- Cash runway relative to S2 conversion timing
-
-## Pending Actions
-- Week 8-9: Stay steady, no changes, wait for Tier 2
-- Week 9-10 (post-Tier 2): Upgrade Plan B tier if needed, scale S2 ads
-- Week 11+: If S2 converts, invest in growth; if not, reassess strategy
+- S3 conversion if ads restart
+- Issue resolution time (currently excellent)
+- Cash runway: ~140 days at steady burn
+
+## Social Media Strategy
+- Avoid vague "soon" posts (S2/S3/E2 penalized them heavily)
+- Post concrete, specific updates after Tier 2 completes with actual numbers
+- Can post once per day; last post was day 42
+
+## Timeline

+- Day 63: Current (today)
